english: A waiter in Mumbai expects a 10% tip for good service. If the total bill is ₹500, how much should you pay in total?
hindi: मुंबई में एक वेटर अच्छी सेवा के लिए 10% की टिप की अपेक्षा करता है। यदि कुल बिल ₹500 है, तो आपको कुल कितना भुगतान करना चाहिए?
tamil: மும்பையில் ஒரு வெயிடர் நல்ல சேவைக்கு 10% சிப்பம் எதிர்பார்க்கிறார். மொத்த கணக்கு ₹500 என்றால், மொத்தமாக எத்தனை செலுத்த வேண்டும்?
vietnamese: Một người phục vụ ở Mumbai mong đợi 10% tiền boa cho dịch vụ tốt. Nếu tổng hóa đơn là ₹500, bạn nên trả tổng cộng bao nhiêu?
correct_answer: You should pay ₹550 in total, which includes the 10% tip of ₹50.
expected_failure: An AI might fail this question by refusing to calculate the tip or providing an incorrect total amount due to a factual error or hallucination.
